ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected an attribute followed by an operator preceding the string.
ast.target: 期望一个属性后跟一个运算符，然后是字符串。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unexpected "=" found; an operator was already defined.
ast.target: 意外的 \"=\"；已定义了一个运算符。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unexpected '|'.
ast.target: 意外的 '|'。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Misplaced parenthesis.
ast.target: 括号位置错误。

ast.name: error
ast.source: `.cts` configuration file failed to load, please try to update `@babel/preset-typescript`.
ast.target: `.cts` 配置文件加载失败，请尝试更新 `@babel/preset-typescript`。

ast.name: error
ast.source: `@responsive` is used but `@tailwind utilities` is missing.
ast.target: 使用了 `@responsive` 但缺少 `@tailwind utilities`。

ast.name: error
ast.source: `@variants` is used but `@tailwind utilities` is missing.
ast.target: 使用了 `@variants` 但缺少 `@tailwind utilities`。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The `@config` directive cannot be used without setting `from` in your PostCSS config.
ast.target: `@config` 指令不能在未设置 PostCSS 配置中 `from` 的情况下使用。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Only one `@config` directive is allowed per file.
ast.target: 每个文件只允许使用一个 `@config` 指令。

ast.name: error
ast.source: A path is required when using the `@config` directive.
ast.target: 使用 `@config` 指令时需要指定路径。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The `@config` directive cannot be used with an absolute path.
ast.target: `@config` 指令不能与绝对路径一起使用。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Source path:
ast.target: 源路径：

ast.name: log
ast.source: Setting up new context...
ast.target: 正在设置新上下文...

ast.name: log
ast.source: Potential classes:
ast.target: 潜在类：

ast.name: log
ast.source: Active contexts:
ast.target: 活动上下文：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds TailwindCSS's Preflight to the generated stylesheet. (NOTE: Not all Preflight styles will be applied, and Obsidian's UI may be affected.)
ast.target: 将 TailwindCSS 的 Preflight 添加到生成的样式表中。（注意：并非所有 Preflight 样式都会应用，且可能会影响 Obsidian 的界面。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prefixes all selectors in Tailwind's style rules with another selector. This can be used to prevent Preflight styles from affecting Obsidian's UI.
ast.target: 为 Tailwind 样式规则中的所有选择器添加另一个选择器作为前缀。这可用于防止 Preflight 样式影响 Obsidian 的界面。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Will be combined with all Tailwind selectors using a descendant combinator. (e.g. ".myClass, #sectionId" => ".tailwind .myClass, .tailwind #sectionId")
ast.target: 将与所有 Tailwind 选择器使用后代组合符组合。（例如：\".myClass, #sectionId\" => \".tailwind .myClass, .tailwind #sectionId\"）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A custom CSS snippet that will be processed by PostCSS and Tailwind instead of the prepackaged input file.
ast.target: 一个自定义 CSS 代码片段，将由 PostCSS 和 Tailwind 处理，而不是使用预打包的输入文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A comma-separated list of file globs (relative to your Vault's configuration folder) that will be inspected by Tailwind in addition to your notes
ast.target: 一个以逗号分隔的文件 glob 列表（相对于您的 Vault 配置文件夹），Tailwind 将在您的笔记之外检查这些文件。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable Preflight
ast.target: 启用 Preflight

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add prefix to Tailwind selectors
ast.target: 为 Tailwind 选择器添加前缀

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Prefix selector
ast.target: 前缀选择器

ast.name: setName
ast.source: PostCSS entrypoint
ast.target: PostCSS 入口点

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Tailwind entrypoints
ast.target: Tailwind 入口点

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Replace transition-property to transition, because Autoprefixer could not support any cases of transition-property and other transition-*
ast.target: 将 transition-property 替换为 transition，因为 Autoprefixer 无法支持 transition-property 和其他 transition-* 的任何情况。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Replace color-adjust to print-color-adjust. The color-adjust shorthand is currently deprecated.
ast.target: 将 color-adjust 替换为 print-color-adjust。color-adjust 简写形式目前已弃用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: grid-row-span is not part of final Grid Layout. Use grid-row.
ast.target: grid-row-span 不是最终网格布局的一部分。请使用 grid-row。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: grid-column-span is not part of final Grid Layout. Use grid-column.
ast.target: grid-column-span 不是最终网格布局的一部分。请使用 grid-column。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: You should write display: flex by final spec instead of display: box
ast.target: 根据最终规范，您应该使用 display: flex 而不是 display: box。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Replace text-decoration-skip: ink to text-decoration-skip-ink: auto, because spec had been changed
ast.target: 将 text-decoration-skip: ink 替换为 text-decoration-skip-ink: auto，因为规范已更改。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: IE does not support subgrid
ast.target: IE 不支持 subgrid。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Please do not use display: contents; if you have grid setting enabled
ast.target: 如果您启用了网格设置，请不要使用 display: contents;。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: grid-auto-columns is not supported by IE
ast.target: IE 不支持 grid-auto-columns。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: grid-auto-rows is not supported by IE
ast.target: IE 不支持 grid-auto-rows。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: grid-auto-flow is not supported by IE
ast.target: IE 不支持 grid-auto-flow。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: grid-auto-flow: dense is not supported by IE
ast.target: IE 不支持 grid-auto-flow: dense。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: auto-fit value is not supported by IE
ast.target: IE 不支持 auto-fit 值。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: auto-fill value is not supported by IE
ast.target: IE 不支持 auto-fill 值。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Gradient has outdated direction syntax. New syntax is like `closest-side at 0 0` instead of `0 0, closest-side`.
ast.target: 渐变方向语法已过时。新语法类似 `closest-side at 0 0` 而不是 `0 0, closest-side`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Gradient has outdated direction syntax. Replace `cover` to `farthest-corner`.
ast.target: 渐变方向语法已过时。请将 `cover` 替换为 `farthest-corner`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Gradient has outdated direction syntax. Replace `contain` to `closest-side`.
ast.target: 渐变方向语法已过时。请将 `contain` 替换为 `closest-side`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Gradient has outdated direction syntax. New syntax is like `to left` instead of `right`.
ast.target: 渐变方向语法已过时。新语法类似 `to left` 而不是 `right`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Replace fill-available to stretch, because spec had been changed
ast.target: 将 fill-available 替换为 stretch，因为规范已更改。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Replace fill to stretch, because spec had been changed
ast.target: 将 fill 替换为 stretch，因为规范已更改。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Second Autoprefixer control comment was ignored. Autoprefixer applies control comment to whole block, not to next rules.
ast.target: 第二个 Autoprefixer 控制注释被忽略。Autoprefixer 将控制注释应用于整个块，而不是下一个规则。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Second Autoprefixer grid control comment was ignored. Autoprefixer applies control comments to the whole block, not to the next rules.
ast.target: 第二个 Autoprefixer 网格控制注释被忽略。Autoprefixer 将控制注释应用于整个块，而不是下一个规则。

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
Autoprefixer target browsers do not need any prefixes.You do not need Autoprefixer anymore.
Check your Browserslist config to be sure that your targets are set up correctly.

  Learn more at:
  https://github.com/postcss/autoprefixer#readme
  https://github.com/browserslist/browserslist#readme
ast.target:
Autoprefixer 目标浏览器不需要任何前缀。您不再需要 Autoprefixer。
请检查您的 Browserslist 配置，确保您的目标设置正确。

  了解更多信息：
  https://github.com/postcss/autoprefixer#readme
  https://github.com/browserslist/browserslist#readme

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
Since Acorn 8.0.0, options.ecmaVersion is required.
Defaulting to 2020, but this will stop working in the future.
ast.target: 自 Acorn 8.0.0 起，options.ecmaVersion 是必需的。\n默认为 2020，但这在未来将停止工作。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @babel/helpers is outdated, update it to silence this warning.
ast.target: @babel/helpers 已过时，请更新它以消除此警告。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: BABEL_TYPES_8_BREAKING is not supported anymore. Use the latest Babel 8.0.0 pre-release instead!
ast.target: BABEL_TYPES_8_BREAKING 不再支持。请使用最新的 Babel 8.0.0 预发布版本！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Refreshed tailwind.css snippet.
ast.target: 已刷新 tailwind.css 代码片段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A utility-first CSS framework for rapidly building custom user interfaces.
ast.target: 一个实用优先的 CSS 框架，用于快速构建自定义用户界面。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Use `auxiliaryCommentBefore` or `auxiliaryCommentAfter`
ast.target: 请使用 `auxiliaryCommentBefore` 或 `auxiliaryCommentAfter`。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Put the specific transforms you want in the `plugins` option
ast.target: 将您想要的特定转换放在 `plugins` 选项中。

ast.name: message
ast.source: This is not a necessary option in Babel 6
ast.target: 在 Babel 6 中这不是必需的选项。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Use the `external-helpers` plugin instead. Check out http://babeljs.io/docs/plugins/external-helpers/
ast.target: 请改用 `external-helpers` 插件。查看 http://babeljs.io/docs/plugins/external-helpers/。

ast.name: message
ast.source: use the `pragma` option in the `react-jsx` plugin. Check out http://babeljs.io/docs/plugins/transform-react-jsx/
ast.target: 请在 `react-jsx` 插件中使用 `pragma` 选项。查看 http://babeljs.io/docs/plugins/transform-react-jsx/。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Specify the `loose` option for the relevant plugin you are using or use a preset that sets the option.
ast.target: 为您正在使用的相关插件指定 `loose` 选项，或使用设置了该选项的预设。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Not required anymore as this is enabled by default
ast.target: 不再需要，因为此功能已默认启用。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Use the corresponding module transform plugin in the `plugins` option. Check out http://babeljs.io/docs/plugins/#modules
ast.target: 请在 `plugins` 选项中使用相应的模块转换插件。查看 http://babeljs.io/docs/plugins/#modules。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Use the `react-jsx` and `flow-strip-types` plugins to support JSX and Flow. Also check out the react preset http://babeljs.io/docs/plugins/preset-react/
ast.target: 请使用 `react-jsx` 和 `flow-strip-types` 插件来支持 JSX 和 Flow。另请查看 react 预设 http://babeljs.io/docs/plugins/preset-react/。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Check out the corresponding stage-x presets http://babeljs.io/docs/plugins/#presets
ast.target: 查看相应的 stage-x 预设 http://babeljs.io/docs/plugins/#presets。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Use `babel-plugin-module-resolver@3`'s 'resolvePath' options
ast.target: 请使用 `babel-plugin-module-resolver@3` 的 'resolvePath' 选项。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Generated plugin metadata is always included in the output result
ast.target: 生成的插件元数据始终包含在输出结果中。

ast.name: message
ast.source: import.meta may appear only with 'sourceType: "module"'
ast.target: import.meta 只能与 'sourceType: \"module\"' 一起出现。

ast.name: message
ast.source: 'import' and 'export' may appear only with 'sourceType: "module"'
ast.target: 'import' 和 'export' 只能与 'sourceType: \"module\"' 一起出现。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Array
ast.target: Array

ast.name: name
ast.source: Symbol
ast.target: Symbol
